Full job description

Title: Outside Sales Rep – Start Now, Earn Big | No Experience Needed | $75K–$150K+

Pay: $75,000 – $150,000+ per year (No Cap) | Commission | Weekly Pay

This Isn’t Your Average Job.

No degree required. No experience required. Just ambition.

We’re a fast-growing roofing company expanding across Florida, and we’re looking for a handful of hungry, coachable people who are ready to make real money — starting now.

If you’re 18–25, working a job that’s going nowhere, or just graduating and unsure what’s next — this is worth your attention.

What You’ll Actually Be Doing

  • Meeting with homeowners who already want to talk to us (no cold calling)
  • Walking them through a simple, structured conversation
  • Helping them say yes to something they already need
  • Following up on warm leads our team generates for you
  • Building your own referral network as you grow

No office. No sitting at a desk. You’re out, you’re moving, you’re earning.

What We’re Looking For

  • 18+ and hungry to make money
  • Good with people — friendly, confident, easy to talk to
  • Coachable — you don’t need to know everything, just be willing to learn
  • Reliable transportation and a smartphone
  • Ready to work, not just “interested”

That’s it. We’ll teach you everything else.

What You’ll Get

  • $75K–$150K+ realistic first-year earning potential (no cap on commissions)
  • Weekly pay — every week, not every two
  • Hands-on training from reps already earning six figures
  • Clear path to team lead and management roles fast
  • Support staff handles all the backend — you just sell

Compensation & Schedule

  • 1099 Independent Contractor | Commission Only
  • Full-time | Monday–Friday + some weekends
  • Hiring now in multiple Florida markets

Pay: $75,000.00 - $150,000.00 per year

Benefits:

  • Flexible schedule

Work Location: In person
